# Mochi Mango Arcade

> Free family-friendly browser arcade published by Fire Dragon Interactive.

## Verified facts
- Canonical URL: https://www.mochimangoarcade.com/
- Publisher: Fire Dragon Interactive
- Games: 396
- Playable now: 396
- Original universes: 15
- Price: Free to play
- Account: Optional; not required to play
- Merchandise: Concept preview; purchasing is not currently available
- Last verified: 2026-07-23

## Machine-readable sources
- Verified facts: https://www.mochimangoarcade.com/assets/data/site-facts.json
- Concise game catalogue: https://www.mochimangoarcade.com/ai/catalog.json
- Entity graph: https://www.mochimangoarcade.com/ai/entity-graph.json
- Source catalogue: https://www.mochimangoarcade.com/assets/data/games.json
- Sitemap: https://www.mochimangoarcade.com/sitemap.xml

## Content and ownership
Game pages identify the title, genre, character, universe, objective, version, release date and direct play URL. Games, characters and artwork are original to Fire Dragon Interactive unless a page explicitly states otherwise. No synthetic user ratings, review counts or play counts are published.

## Access
Games run in modern browsers on mobile and desktop. Shared runtimes support touch, mouse and keyboard. Campaign progress and personal bests can be stored locally; an account is not required.
